---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement, triage
assignees: ''
---

## Is your feature request related to a problem?
A clear description of what the problem is. Ex: "I'm always frustrated when [...]"

## Proposed solution
A clear description of what you want to happen.

## Alternatives considered
Any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

## Architecture alignment
If this is a module-level change, which module does it affect?
- [ ] Module 1: Perception
- [ ] Module 2: Affordance
- [ ] Module 3: Type Inferencer
- [ ] Module 4: Working Memory
- [ ] Module 5: Hypothesis Generator
- [ ] Module 6: Goal Inference
- [ ] Module 7: Near-Miss Tracker
- [ ] Module 8: Experiment Planner
- [ ] Module 9: World Model
- [ ] Module 10: Verifier
- [ ] Module 11: Planner Interface
- [ ] Module 12: Context Compressor
- [ ] Module 13: Reasoning Engine
- [ ] Module 14: Cascade Interpreter
- [ ] Module 15: Spatial Memory Map
- [ ] Module 16: Agent State Tracker
- [ ] Module 17: Policy Prior
- [ ] Module 18: Goal Predicate Vocabulary
- [ ] Other (specify)

## Additional context
Mockups, references, or related papers.
